items.caption: A movie poster for the film "distorted." it features a split image of a woman and a man, both looking directly at the viewer with serious expressions. the woman is on the left and the man is on the right. the background is a gradient of dark to light gray, and there is text overlaying the image. the text at the top reads "christina ricci" and "john cusack," indicating the lead actors in the film. below the images, the title "distorted" is prominently displayed in large, bold letters. beneath the title, there is a tagline that reads "don't fear the lie. fear the truth." this suggests a theme of deception and the importance of uncovering the truth. the overall style of the poster is moody and suspenseful, with a color palette that emphasizes shadows and contrasts.
